text:
#### Procedure under Article 11(7) of the Council Regulation where the court receives a non-return order made under Article 13 of the 1980 Hague Convention by a court in another Member State E+W


F94 12.60. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


Textual Amendments


F94 Rule 12.60 omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 9(9) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


#### Transfer of proceedings under F95 ... Article 8 of the 1996 Hague Convention E+W


12.61. —(1) Where the court is considering the transfer of proceedings to the court of another F96 ... Contracting State under rules 12.62 to 12.64 it will—


(2) The court may, with the consent of all parties, deal with the question of transfer without a hearing.


(3) Directions which are in force immediately prior to the transfer of proceedings to a court in another F97 ... Contracting State under rules 12.62 to 12.64 will continue to apply until the court in that other State accepts jurisdiction in accordance with the provisions of F98 ... the 1996 Hague Convention F99 ..., subject to any variation or revocation of the directions.


(4) The court or court officer will—


(5) A register of all applications and requests for transfer of jurisdiction to or from another F100 ... Contracting State will be kept by the principal registry.


Textual Amendments

metadata.title: Part 12 — Children Proceedings except Parental Order Proceedings and Proceedings for Applications in Adoption, Placement and Related Proceedings
